message:
test(tui): add 29 unit tests for hit regions, dispatch routing, and action state machines (br-1xt0m.1.13.7)

Hit regions (10): boundary rects, zero-area chrome, tab slot overwrite/accessor,
drag forwarding, classify boundaries, distinct overlay/status IDs.

Action menu (9): empty/single-entry navigation, mixed enabled/disabled traversal,
disabled attempt reasons, thread-less messages, non-key event consumption,
close/reopen reset, builder chain.

Action execution (10): overlay layer ordering/focus contracts, Navigate/DeepLink/
CopyToClipboard/Dismiss dispatch, InFlight→Failure replacement, concurrent
operation coexistence, modal lifecycle, action menu focus trapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
